regions.reason: CSS backdrop-filter cannot reproduce NSVisualEffectView menu material; blur radius and material bias are emulator calibration (--sk-emulator-*), and the reference capture sampled the user's live desktop rather than the synthetic backdrop.
Canvas 2D approximation pending a WebGL2 port of fx_starfield (shader id 3); colors are token-exact, geometry/phase are not.

The real footer is a native AppKit NSVisualEffectView host painted as a SEPARATE overlay window — protocol captureScreenshot of the GPUI main window shows an empty 36px band, so the reference has no footer pixels to register against. Button truth comes from a live protocol probe (nativeFooterHostInstalled:true; run='Converse ↵', actions='Actions ⌘K', ai='Agent ⌘↵'). Verify footer content via protocol receipts, not the reference PNG.

GPUI/CoreText vs browser glyph rasterization; .AppleSystemUIFont weight 430/450 may rasterize differently than -apple-system. Glyph advances also differ slightly, so long runs (the search placeholder) accumulate horizontal drift left-to-right even when the text origin registers. Geometry (bounds/baselines/origins) must still match.
